creator: nemysis@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Update to 2.0.0
- Add PORTEPOCH
- Change master site to SAVANNAH
- Take maintainership
- Add license (GPLv2)
- Use the new format for LIB_DEPENDS
- USES gmake instead of USE_GMAKE
- Disable all warnings with -w
- Support STAGEDIR
- Symlink the icon instead of copying it
